cases.prompt: /laravel-agent:scaffold-app e-commerce store with products, categories, cart, and checkout
cases.expect: forks the laravel-architect agent, drafts a blueprint, and scaffolds a multi-phase application (migrations, models, controllers, views, tests) from the description

cases.prompt: scaffold a new SaaS booking app with appointments, customers, and payments --api-only --multi-tenant
cases.expect: forks the laravel-architect agent and generates an API-only, multi-tenant application with no Blade views

cases.prompt: /laravel-agent:scaffold-app blog platform with posts, comments, and tags --admin
cases.expect: forks the laravel-architect agent and includes a Filament admin panel alongside the scaffolded app
